title: Data Acquisition
description: Includes all stages of the process of acquiring a data product or services, beginning with the process for determining the need for the product or service and ending with the final stage of data st...

definitions.definition: Includes all stages of the process of acquiring a data product or services, beginning with the process for determining the need for the product or service and ending with the final stage of data storage or archival.

- [NIST Glossary](https://csrc.nist.gov/glossary/term/Broad_network_access)
